Bash(cd /c/stream/leadharvester && PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "
from scraper.places import search_businesses
from scraper.website import scrape_all_websites
from main import export_to_excel

# Get only first 5 businesses for the test run to keep it fast
businesses = search_businesses\('Law Firms', 'Lagos'\)
test_batch = businesses[:5]

print\(f'\\nRunning website scrape on first 5 businesses...\\n'\)
scrape_all_websites\(test_batch\)

filepath = export_to_excel\(test_batch, 'Law Firms', 'Lagos'\)
print\(f'\\nExport saved: {filepath}'\)

print\('\\n--- Final Results ---'\)
for b in test_batch:
    priority = 'HIGH PRIORITY' if b.is_high_priority\(\) else 'standard'
    print\(f'  {b.business_name}'\)
    print\(f'    Email    : {b.email or \\"N/A\\"}'\)
    print\(f'    Phone    : {b.phone or \\"N/A\\"}'\)
    print\(f'    WhatsApp : {b.whatsapp or \\"N/A\\"}'\)
    print\(f'    Instagram: {b.instagram or \\"N/A\\"}'\)
    print\(f'    Facebook : {b.facebook or \\"N/A\\"}'\)
    print\(f'    Score    : {b.website_quality_score}/100  [{priority}]'\)
    print\(f'    Issues   : {b.website_issues}'\)
    print\(\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "
from db.database import get_db_connection
conn = get_db_connection\(\)
conn.execute\('DELETE FROM contacts'\)
conn.execute\('UPDATE businesses SET enriched_at = NULL'\)
conn.commit\(\)
rows = conn.execute\('SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM contacts'\).fetchone\(\)[0]
enriched = conn.execute\('SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM businesses WHERE enriched_at IS NOT NULL'\).fetchone\(\)[0]
conn.close\(\)
print\('Contacts remaining:', rows\)
print\('Businesses marked enriched:', enriched\)
")

import sqlite3
conn = sqlite3.connect\('output/leadharvest.db'\)
conn.execute\('DELETE FROM contacts'\)
conn.execute\('UPDATE businesses SET enriched_at = NULL'\)
conn.commit\(\)
contacts = conn.execute\('SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM contacts'\).fetchone\(\)[0]
enriched = conn.execute\('SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM businesses WHERE enriched_at IS NOT NULL'\).fetchone\(\)[0]
conn.close\(\)
print\('Contacts remaining:', contacts\)
print\('Businesses marked enriched:', enriched\)
")

import sqlite3
conn = sqlite3.connect\('output/leadharvest.db'\)
print\('Draft statuses:'\)
for row in conn.execute\('SELECT status, COUNT\(*\) FROM drafts GROUP BY status'\).fetchall\(\):
    print\(' ', row[0], ':', row[1]\)
print\('Campaigns sent:'\)
print\(' ', conn.execute\(\\"SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM campaigns WHERE status='sent'\\"\).fetchone\(\)[0]\)
conn.close\(\)
")
